libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep tests self-contained by starting a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 and exercising WebClient requests against it; do not require external services. For nativeTest on 5.0.1 / JDK 25, set runtime system properties matching the 5.0.0 scaffold: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The current 5.0.0 build.gradle applies those native runtime properties only when libraryVersion == 5.0.0, so override runs with GVM_TCK_LV=5.0.1 can miss them.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative; if those properties are insufficient, the remaining issue is likely reachability metadata rather than additional setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed: vertx-web-client is normally exercised with an in-process Vert.x HttpServer and its runtime classpath already brings vertx-core, web-common, auth-common, uri-template, Netty, and Jackson. However, 5.0.1 still uses Netty 4.2.x, and the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Java 25 native runs need explicit Netty/Unsafe runtime properties.
